CustomField.description: Indicates the adjustment amount carried forward from the previous rent period, representing either an additional rent amount to be debited (if prior rent was understated) or credited (if prior rent was overstated). [LOAD:Yes] [JUSTIFICATION:This is a Currency Field on the Rent Schedule and it will be a user input Field for the Floating Rent Type.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.label: Rental Credit/Debit($)
